creator: jlduran@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 237701
MWE

Attached is a simple MWE that reproduces a few bugs in the current strfmon_l(3) code.

I have created a GitHub pull request (#620), which attempts to fix them:
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/pull/620

% ./strfmon_l_mwe 
Expected: [ **1234,57 €] [ **1.234,57 EUR]
  Actual: [ €**1234.57 ] [ EUR**1234.57 ]

Expected: [ £**1234.57] [ GBP**1,234.57]
  Actual: [ £**1234.57 ] [ GBP**1234.57 ]

Posting it here fore visibility and tracking.
